upcoming.name: Blupets
upcoming.description: Blupets are onchain pixel pets from the Blupix universe. Reveal, merge, and evolve them into new forms. Over time, they can grow into agentic NFTs.

news.title: 6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

Lets talk about it okHOTSHOT The Big Dump today at 6:00 PM ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CE...

Okay I’m not doing this obnoxious shit. I’ll just say it. This is embarrassing for the United States n making me regret my vote. MELANIA TRUMP The Official Melania Meme is live! You can buy $MELANIA now.melaniameme.com FUAfBo2jgks6gB4Z4LfZkqSZgzNucisEHqnNebaRxM1P So I’ve been working with my likely meme coin drop team. We’ve come up with a way to do the drop so the coins is spread EQUALLY across 1...

Here is my full interview with from Monday, September 16th at Mar-a-Lago. It was incredible to be able to speak about our industry and how Donald Trump plans on making America the "Crypto Capital of the world”. Look mom, I just interviewed ! What an honour. Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking forwa...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.
Crypto’s mascot. Just joined the Huddle today! Picked up #1915 and pumped to be a part of this awesome community!

When I say Pengu Morning and you say it back A year ago, I bought my first . Today, I finally became a holder.  Honestly, this feels like a dream come true. Huge love to the Pudgy community for building one of the most positive corners of Web3. Does the Pudgy flock follow its own? SnoopDoge Striving for excellence here at Nominated and won a Webby. Cheers to the next ones
Say something nice about Pengu and we may send you one of these
Our brand-new Pudgy Perchies are now live! Designed to bring a bit of Pudgy Penguins with you wherever you go - perfectly crafted to perch on your phone or computer monitor. Get yours here:

Set 1 of the Azuki TCG is officially launching June 26! Talk to your local shop to order through PHD Games or GTS. There's five days left to get stock by launch day! [vist.ly/56sav](https://t.co/Xjh20UeRB3) [4.3K](https://x.com/AzukiTCG/status/2063003081646703002/analytics)
Lightning  Which element calls to you? [6.7K](https://x.com/Azuki/status/2062565273035497825/analytics)
Before Raizan, there was Rei. This is where her story begins. [13K](https://x.com/Azuki/status/2061840646223127021/analytics)
